findings.issue: Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance is partially implemented but not integrated. Schema files and transformer exist, but no issuer endpoint or cryptographic signing.
findings.recommended_fix: Build DID issuer service, connect transformer to assessment completion flow, add revocation registry. Integrate with /api/credentials/issue endpoint. Estimate: 350 lines across 5 files.

findings.issue: Blocker #15 marked as ready-to-build, but implementation has started. Status is inaccurate.
findings.recommended_fix: Update status to '🟡 partial' with link to src/credentials/openbadges/. Clarify scope: issuance vs. full VC compliance.
